name: @dustwave/podcast
description: Dust Wave podcast API, media orchestration, premium feeds, and publishing jobs

scripts.check: npm run types && npm run typecheck && npm test
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local --env staging
scripts.db:migrate:staging: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --env staging
scripts.db:migrate:production: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --env production
